name: Quality Bar Honest
summary: When a user demands "100% delivery" or "ship everything now" on scope that exceeds session capacity at quality bar, reply with the honest-scope framing:…
description: When a user demands "100% delivery" or "ship everything now" on scope that exceeds session capacity at quality bar, reply with the honest-scope framing: explicit what-I-can-ship vs what's-deferred. Cite the quality-bar rule. Don't ship hacks.
author: marvelousempire
goal: Deliver quality bar honest output correctly and completely.
